prompt: Add event snapshots to reduce replay time

turns.content:
<task>
Add snapshot support to the event store. When replaying, start from the latest snapshot instead of the beginning.
</task>

arguments.summary: Read src/event-store.ts — EventStore with events array, auto-incrementing version. append() adds events, replay() returns all. Need to add createSnapshot() and modify replay() to use snapshots.

next_steps.description: Add Snapshot interface, createSnapshot(), and snapshot-aware replay() to EventStore

turns.content:
PASS src/event-store.test.ts
  EventStore
    ✓ appends events with version (3 ms)
    ✓ replays all events (1 ms)
    ✓ creates snapshot (1 ms)
    ✓ replays from snapshot (2 ms)
    ✓ replays all when no snapshot (1 ms)

Tests: 5 passed, 5 total
Time: 1.3s

arguments.summary: Added snapshot support to src/event-store.ts. Snapshot stores state + version. createSnapshot() saves current state, replay(fromSnapshot=true) returns only events after latest snapshot. getLatestSnapshot() accessor. All 5 tests pass.
arguments.final_answer: Added event store snapshots in src/event-store.ts. Snapshots capture state at a version. Replay skips events before the latest snapshot. All 5 tests pass.
